title: erigeron aragonensis
intro: Erigeron aragonensis, also known as the Aragon daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Erigeron aragonensis include its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its ability to support the immune system. Erigeron aragonensis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to treat various conditions, including skin irritations and respiratory issues.
